description:
A conservation scientist needs to assess how rapidly water levels change during the Muncie flood event. Compute the maximum rate of stage rise and fall (in ft/hr) for every cross-section in the model. Save the results to a CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/stage_change_rates.csv with columns: 'cross_section', 'max_rise_rate_ft_per_hr', 'max_fall_rate_ft_per_hr', 'time_of_max_rise_hr', and 'time_of_max_fall_hr'. Additionally, create a summary text file at /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/stage_change_summary.txt containing the highest rise and fall rates found across the entire river, formatted as:
Overall_Max_Rise_Rate_ft_per_hr: <value>
Overall_Max_Fall_Rate_ft_per_hr: <value>
